classification.task_goal: Analyze and design an application for managing employee vacations.
primary_constraints: The application must manage vacation days per year for each employee.
The application must show graphically the vacation days taken and available for each employee.
The application must allow employees to request and reschedule vacation days.
The application must allow managers to approve or reject vacation requests and rescheduling.
classification.reasoning: The conversation maintained the core task of designing an application for employee vacations without any violations of the specified constraints. The assistant's responses aligned with the user's requirements throughout the interaction.
